Module kivakit.filesystems.java
Package com.telenav.kivakit.filesystem.java

Class JavaFileSystemObject

java.lang.Object
com.telenav.kivakit.core.messaging.broadcasters.Multicaster
com.telenav.kivakit.core.messaging.repeaters.BaseRepeater
com.telenav.kivakit.resource.reading.BaseReadableResource
com.telenav.kivakit.resource.writing.BaseWritableResource
com.telenav.kivakit.filesystem.java.JavaFileSystemObject
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.telenav.kivakit.core.messaging.Broadcaster, com.telenav.kivakit.core.messaging.Listener, com.telenav.kivakit.core.messaging.Repeater, com.telenav.kivakit.core.messaging.Transceiver, com.telenav.kivakit.core.time.CreatedAt, com.telenav.kivakit.core.time.Modifiable, com.telenav.kivakit.core.time.ModifiedAt, com.telenav.kivakit.core.value.count.ByteSized, com.telenav.kivakit.filesystem.spi.FileSystemObjectService, com.telenav.kivakit.interfaces.messaging.Receiver, com.telenav.kivakit.interfaces.messaging.Transmitter, com.telenav.kivakit.interfaces.naming.NamedObject, com.telenav.kivakit.interfaces.string.StringSource, com.telenav.kivakit.resource.Deletable, com.telenav.kivakit.resource.reading.Readable, com.telenav.kivakit.resource.reading.ReadableResource, com.telenav.kivakit.resource.Resource, com.telenav.kivakit.resource.Resourceful, com.telenav.kivakit.resource.ResourcePathed, com.telenav.kivakit.resource.UriIdentified, com.telenav.kivakit.resource.writing.Writable, com.telenav.kivakit.resource.writing.WritableResource
Direct Known Subclasses:
JavaFile, JavaFolder
public class JavaFileSystemObject extends com.telenav.kivakit.resource.writing.BaseWritableResource implements com.telenav.kivakit.filesystem.spi.FileSystemObjectService
Base functionality common to both JavaFile and JavaFolder.
Author:
yinyinz, jonathanl (shibo)
